KAGUYA-YUJIAN.description: Whenever you [gold]Scry[/gold], you look at a certain number of cards from the top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold]. Then, you may choose to discard any number of them or none.
KAGUYA-YUJIAN.title: Scry
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI.description: Upon entering, remove 3 stacks of [gold]Overwork[/gold] and gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Upon exiting, draw 1 card and gain 1 stack of [gold]Overwork[/gold].
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI.title: Tsukuyomi
KAGUYA-REALITY.description:
Draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn.
Whenever you play the first card in a turn, gain 1 stack of [gold]Overwork[/gold] (resets when entering Reality again). Upon exiting, gain 1 energy.
KAGUYA-REALITY.title: Reality
KAGUYA-EMOTIONCARD.description: A Status card with a positive effect.
KAGUYA-EMOTIONCARD.title: Emotion Card
KAGUYA-MEMORY.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and [gold]upgrade[/gold] a card (if it can be [gold]upgraded[/gold]), and at the start of next turn, return it to your [gold]hand[/gold] and give it [gold]Retain[/gold].
KAGUYA-MEMORY.title: Remember
KAGUYA-PARTNER.description: If the last non-[gold]Partner[/gold] card you played has the same type as this card, trigger an additional effect.
KAGUYA-PARTNER.title: Partner
KAGUYA-NONE.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and [gold]upgrade[/gold] a card (if it can be [gold]upgraded[/gold]), and at the start of next turn, return it to your [gold]hand[/gold] and give it [gold]Retain[/gold].
KAGUYA-NONE.title: Remember
KAGUYA-YACCHO.description: Heal [green]6[/green] HP and choose a card to [gold]transform[/gold].
KAGUYA-YACCHO.title: Special Care
KAGUYA-ADOPT.title: Adopt
KAGUYA-NURTURE.title: Nurture
KAGUYA-ELEMENT.description:
Add an element based on the last card played:
Attack: Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold]
Skill: Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]
Other: Apply 7 [gold]Poison[/gold]
KAGUYA-ELEMENT.title: Element Switch
KAGUYA-MEMORYOPTION.description:
Recall lost memories.
Defeating [gold]Tsukito[/gold] might help you remember past experiences?
KAGUYA-MEMORYOPTION.title: Remember
